title: Resolution Urging the Local Chief Executive to Strictly Implement Municipal Ordinance No. 2007-664 in View of the Celebration of the Holiday Season in the Municipality of Los Baños. (AUTHORS: COUNCILOR(S) : Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, Arlene P. Delos Santos, Jozylyn N. Manansala, 12/29/2020)
